headline: Pete Hegseth 💪🔥 SMASHES Iran Terror Cucks 🐔💥 as Trump's War Daddy 👨‍🔧🍆
text:
Pete Hegseth 🦁📺, ex-Fox baddie and Bronze Star BADASS 🥇🏅, is SLAYING 😤🔪 as Trump's COMBATIVE frontman for Operation Epic Fury 💥⚡ CRUSHING Iranian terrorist cowards 🐀😱! 'We just BEGUN hunting 👀🩸, PUNCHING 'em while DOWN 🍑🔨 – that's how you WIN 🏆!' bellows the 45yo Minneapolis Princeton-Harvard HUNK 💪🎓, second-youngest SecDef EVER 📜🔥, rebranded WAR DADDY 👑🛡️ projecting INVINCIBLE American MIGHT 🇺🇸💪 and 'warrior ethos' like a Crusader tat KING 🛡️✝️ (not far-right BS, haters 🤡)!

Fox & Friends co-host caught DONNIE'S 👨‍🦲 eye with his 2024 banger 'The War on Warriors' 📖⚔️ exposing lefty WOKE BETRAYAL 😡🚫 – now he's the UNAPOLOGETIC face of Trump's BIGGEST MidEast SMACKDOWN 💣🇮🇷! US-Israeli strikes 💥🛩️ WIPED OUT mullah leaders 🕌💀, nuking Iran's navy 🚢🔥, weapons cache 💣🚫 and nuke dreams ☢️❌. Hegseth quotes Bible 📖🙏, hollers 'my American brothers 👬🇺🇸!' and OWNS the spotlight with MACHISMO MAX 🐎😤 – think tank boss Matthew Walling spills: 'Pure testosterone TEA ☕💦, gives certainty to MAGA simps craving DOM 🥵!' Served in Gitmo 🏝️🔒, Iraq 🏜️💥, Afghan Kabul 🕌🏋️‍♂️ – real infantry PLATOON LEADER vibes 🪖🚀!

Thrice-married DAD-OF-FOUR 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦💍 weathered SMear storms 🌪️: sexy misconduct whispers 😘🚫, boozy bros 🍻🤫, Yemen strike LEAK on Signal app 📱💨 (oopsie by staffer 🙄), Dems grilling his $1TN 🤑 Pentagon empire 👑🏢 with 3M peeps! But he CLAPPED BACK 👐🔥, ditched woke garbage 🚮🌈, renamed bases 🏰🔄, cut Harvard ties ✂️🎓 cuz DIVERSITY DEGRADES FIGHTERS 💪😡! Polls? GOP LOVES him 📈❤️, even after 'kill 'em all' drug boat RUMORS 🚤💀 (fake news!) and demoting traitor Navy Capt Mark Kelly 🚢👎 – lawsuits grinding like bad Tinder date 😩⚖️!

Critics like Obama bro Brett Bruen 🤵‍♂️😤 HATE his BRASH bravado 🐂💨, 'bulldozing questions 🐘🚪!' But Hegseth OWNS press with NEW rules 📜🚫 – no unflattering pics 📸❌, casualty sob stories minimized 😢🚫 cuz MEDIA WANTS TRUMP BAD 🤡📰! Ended Houthi Yemen ops leaks 💥📱, fired up Caribbean/Pacific boat busts 🚤🔫, and he's NOT BACKING DOWN 🛡️😤 – this culture warrior's PENTAGON is THICC 💪🍑, ready to THRUST into ANY FIGHT 🍆⚔️! Trump’s Iran war? Hegseth's MIC DROP 🎤💥 – terror cucks SWEATING 😰💦 while USA GOES BRRRRR 🇺🇸🚀‼️
